h1.visual_description: Not present in sample, but inferred as major chapter titles based on footer context.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript numeric digits following a word or punctuation.
Small-font block at the bottom of the page starting with a number corresponding to a superscript.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric superscript references with full bibliographic details in footer (Chicago or APA style variant).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page number followed by a vertical pipe and the chapter/book title at the bottom left (e.g., '54 | Misleading Data Visualizations').
